modules.name: Workshop System
modules.description: Complete Music Thing Modular Workshop System – analog section. Includes 2x VCO, Stereo In, Ring Mod, Stompbox, Amplifier, 4 Voltages, 2x Humpback Filter, 2x Slopes, and Mixer. Connect to MTM Workshop Computer VCV for the computer section.

modules.name: Pedalboard
modules.description: Eurorack Pedalboard with 5 built-in effects (Distortion, Phaser, Chorus, Delay, Reverb) and a Eurorack/Pedal level switch.
